name: 311 Cases
description: SUMMARY Dataset contains SF311 cases created since 7/1/2008 with location information. UPDATE PROCESS This dataset updates daily. HOW TO USE THIS DATASET Download data using 'export' button to the right. For more information on this dataset, visit the FAQ page. Want to map the data in your neighborhood? Check out https://sf.connect.socrata.com/ For more information about Open311, see http://www.open311.org/.

approvals.message: The `strict_permissions` flag must be on to enable internal approvals.

columns.name: CaseID
columns.description: The unique ID of the service request created.

columns.name: Opened
columns.description: The date and time when the service request was made

columns.name: Closed
columns.description: The date and time when the service request was closed

columns.name: Updated
columns.description: The date and time when the service request was last modified. For requests with status=closed, this will be the date the request was closed

columns.name: Status
columns.description: A single-word indicator of the current state of the service request. (Note: GeoReport V2 only permits ‘open’ and ‘closed’)

columns.name: Status Notes
columns.description: Explanation of why status was changed to current state or more details on current status than conveyed with status alone

cachedContents.largest: Wrong Park, Work is Pending - This is actually Golden Gate Park, not GG Heights Park. The projected start date for this work is April or May.

top.item: See Notes tab for more details
Case Resolved - Per process - cases are closed 10 days after assignment.
Comment Noted - The report has been logged and will help the City collect data on double parking and bike lane violations to determine target areas and future enforcement efforts. Thank you.
Case Resolved - meter shop has closed this request
Case is a Duplicate - This issue has already been reported through an earlier request.

columns.name: Responsible Agency
columns.description: The agency responsible for fulfilling or otherwise addressing the service request.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: The human readable name of the service request type

columns.name: Request Type
columns.description: The human readable name of the service request subtype

columns.name: Request Details
columns.description: The human readable name of the service request details

columns.name: Address
columns.description: Human readable address or description of location

columns.name: Street
columns.description: Primary Street of the associated address. Parks may have a park name instead of a street name. Requests not associated with an address will be blank.

columns.name: Supervisor District
columns.description: San Francisco Supervisor District as defined in 'Supervisor Districts as of 2022'

columns.name: Neighborhood
columns.description: San Francisco Neighborhood as defined in 'SF Find Neighborhoods'

columns.name: Analysis Neighborhood
columns.description: San Francisco Analysis Neighborhood as defined in 'Analysis Neighborhoods'

columns.name: Police District
columns.description: San Francisco Police District as defined in 'Current Police Districts'

columns.name: Latitude
columns.description: Latitude of the location, using the WGS84 projection

columns.name: Longitude
columns.description: Longitude of the location, using the WGS84 projection

columns.name: Point
columns.description: Combination of Latitude and Longitude for Socrata native maps

columns.name: point_geom
columns.description: Combination of Latitude and Longitude in Point format

columns.name: Source
columns.description: Mechanism or path by which the service request was received; typically ‘Phone’, ‘Text/SMS’, ‘Website’, ‘Mobile App’, ‘Twitter’, etc but terms may vary by system.

columns.name: Media URL
columns.description: A URL to media associated with the request, e.g. an image.

columns.name: BOS_2012
columns.description: San Francisco Supervisor District as defined in 'Supervisor Districts as of 2012'

columns.name: data_as_of
columns.description: Timestamp the row was updated in the source system

columns.name: data_loaded_at
columns.description: Timestamp the row was uploaded to the open data portal
